title: Evidence Item
description: A discrete unit of evidence logged in the Constitutional Evidence Ledger (CEL). BKGC v2.0 Art. XIII–XIV. Evidence items are NEVER deleted — only deprecated.

ev_id.description: Unique Evidence Item ID. Format: EV-{YYYYMMDD}-{NNNN}. Derivative items: EV-{YYYYMMDD}-{NNNN}-D{N}. BKR-02.

title.description: Short descriptive title of the evidence item.

description.description: Detailed description of the evidence item and its relevance.

source_reliability_score.description: Source reliability score (0–20). Scored per BGS-06.

source_url.description: URL or URI of the source, if applicable.

source_citation.description: Full citation in standard legal or academic citation format.

source_author.description: Author or issuing body of the source.

source_publication_date.description: ISO 8601 publication or effective date of the source.

jurisdiction_code.description: BKR-08/09/10 jurisdiction code applicable to this evidence item.

collected_at.description: ISO 8601 datetime when this evidence item was collected (UTC).

collected_by.description: Agent ID or human identifier of the collector.

integrity_status.description: Current authentication/integrity status of this evidence item.

authenticated_at.description: ISO 8601 datetime of last successful authentication per BGS-05.

authenticated_by.description: Agent ID or human identifier who performed authentication.

content_hash.description: SHA-256 hash of the source content at time of authentication. Used for integrity verification.

reverification_due.description: ISO 8601 date of next required re-verification. Based on BGS-09 intervals: SC-01/02 = 180 days, SC-03/04 = 90 days, SC-05 = annual, SC-06 = 30 days.

chain_of_custody.description: Ordered, append-only chain of custody log. Every access, transfer, and transformation recorded.

deprecation.description: Required if integrity_status = DEPRECATED. Records the supersession event.

is_ai_generated.description: True if this content was generated by an AI system. AI-generated content is SC-06 and cannot serve as primary authority per CDR-00001.

ko_ids.description: KO-IDs of all knowledge objects that reference this evidence item.

legal_hold.description: True if this evidence item is under a legal hold order per BGS-19. Blocks all modification and archival.

notes.description: Internal notes. Not included in external outputs.

origin_description.description: Description of where and how the source originated.

obtained_from.description: The specific location, database, or person from whom this evidence was obtained.

obtained_method.description: Method of collection: e.g., direct download, court docket, manual review, API call.

transformations.description: List of any transformations applied to the original source (OCR, translation, excerpt). Each transformation documented.

actor.description: Agent ID or human identifier performing the action.

prior_hash.description: Hash of the prior state, for tamper detection.

reason.description: Reason for deprecation (e.g., superseded, source retracted, content changed).

successor_ev_id.description: EV-ID of the successor evidence item, if replaced.
